_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Data-Layer Test Module — Migrations, FTS, DB Identity

steps.description: Implement the data-layer test package: (1) tests/integration/data_layer/__init__.py — package marker. (2) tests/integration/data_layer/test_fts_trigger_invariant.py — for every tsvector column (work_items.design_doc_search, work_items.functional_doc_search, project_docs.content_search), INSERT + UPDATE and assert the tsvector column is populated and refreshed; parametrized one case per tsvector column; the db_session fixture's template DB already installs all FTS triggers via alembic upgrade head; extends (does not replace) test_work_items_functional_doc_fts.py. (3) tests/integration/data_layer/test_migration_revision_skew.py — reproduce the I-00075/I-00076 failure class as a regression test: point a testcontainer DB's alembic_version at a revision ID absent from the repo's migration graph, run alembic upgrade head, assert it fails with the 'Can't locate revision' resolution error; no skew guard is added (test-only); any Alembic downgrade targets a specific revision ID, never -1. (4) tests/integration/data_layer/test_db_identity_invariants.py — match path allows connections; mismatch path refuses; builds on test_db_identity_integration.py without replacing it. (5) Makefile target data-layer-check: runs make migration-check then uv run pytest tests/integration/data_layer/ -v --no-cov. (6) Update docs/IW_AI_Core_Testing_Strategy.md, skills/iw-ai-core-testing/SKILL.md (+ iw sync-skills --force), and ai-dev/work/TESTS_ENHANCEMENT.md (item 3.6 DONE + changelog). Demonstrate each new test can fail via a deliberate-break-then-revert and record as tdd_red_evidence. Test-only CR — no production code may be edited and no new migration file may be created. 2400s timeout.

Per-agent review of S01: scope discipline (no production code touched, no migration file added, no residual deliberate-break injection); AC1 FTS-trigger invariant correctness (tsvector populated + refreshed, parametrized one case per tsvector column, existing test_work_items_functional_doc_fts.py untouched); AC2 revision-skew regression test (alembic upgrade head against a DB at an absent revision asserted to fail with the 'Can't locate revision' error, no skew guard added, Alembic downgrade targets specific revision ID not -1); AC3 DB-identity invariants (match + mismatch paths, existing test_db_identity_integration.py untouched); AC4 make data-layer-check aggregates migration-check + data_layer/ module; AC5 no new migration file + existing migration-check still green; AC6 tdd_red_evidence + docs/skill/plan updated and .claude/skills copy byte-identical. Pre-review lint+format+test-assertions gate must show zero new violations.

Global cross-agent review of S01..S02: every AC (AC1-AC6) verified end-to-end; scope integrity (git diff origin/main -- orch/ dashboard/ executor/ is empty; git diff origin/main -- orch/db/migrations/ is empty — no new migration file); test_work_items_functional_doc_fts.py and test_db_identity_integration.py and test_migrations_round_trip.py all untouched; skills/iw-workflow/SKILL.md canonical QV-gate list NOT modified (no new gate); make data-layer-check runs make migration-check then data_layer/ module; TESTS_ENHANCEMENT.md changelog counts match the S01 report. Runs the full unit + integration suites — make test-integration executes the new data-layer modules; a failure there is CRITICAL.
QV: Assertion scanner (forbid new vacuous tests)
QV: Integration tests — runs the new data-layer modules

Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill. Note the tdd_red_evidence quality for all three test modules, whether S09 (integration-tests) needed fix cycles from newly-surfaced data-layer bugs, the xfail count and any Incidents filed, and whether make data-layer-check runs cleanly end-to-end.
